result.stdout:
NuExporter is a dotnet that helps investigate NuGet restore issues. 
It lets you prepare a solution, which is stripped of any sensitive information, so it can be shared publicly.
result.stderr:
NuExporter 1.2.0
Copyright 2021-2022 Marcin Krystianc

  --solution-file             Solution file to process

  --output-path               Required. Where to write exported solution

  --anonymize                 (Default: true) Anonymize project and package
                              names

  --public-packages-source    (Default: https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json)
                              NuGet source to check which packages are public
                              and which are private

  --help                      Display this help screen.

  --version                   Display version information.
